## Mission Control change safety

Before submitting this PR, read `docs/MISSION_CONTROL_FEATURE_CONTRACT.md` and `docs/PR_HYGIENE_WORKFLOW.md`.

### Feature Contract impact

- [ ] I checked `docs/MISSION_CONTROL_FEATURE_CONTRACT.md` for every touched route.
- [ ] No user-visible capability was removed.
- [ ] Any removed/replaced capability is documented and explicitly approved below.
- [ ] Cleanup/refactor changes preserve existing behavior unless listed below.

Approved removal/replacement, if any:

```text
Capability removed/replaced:
Reason:
Approved by:
Replacement path:
Verification:
Rollback:
```

### Checks run

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Python/static tests, if applicable:
- [ ] Browser/DOM smoke for touched routes, if applicable:
- [ ] API smoke for backend changes, if applicable:
- [ ] Console/log check, if applicable:

### Conflict handling

- [ ] Branch was updated from latest `main` before merge.
- [ ] Conflicts were resolved in this PR branch, not by a later batch commit.
- [ ] Checks were rerun after conflict resolution.
